name: Tramhaus (NL)
description: Tramhaus is a live wire five-piece band from Rotterdam, heralded for their energetic shows and riveting song material. The band is known for their broad and ever-electrifying sound that reaches from post-hardcore to shoegaze to punk rock. This amalgam is a product of the diverse and rich musical tastes of its members. Nonetheless, in a live setting the band forms a strong union. It makes sure to grab the audience from the first to the last note in a maelstrom of emotions. In its short existence, the symbiotic group toured endlessly, gaining popularity along the way.
